zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I於1162年出生時，他的父親Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis21歲，母親Ida de Chiny20歲。他和Elisabeth de Dampierre至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1222年6月20日享年60歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆斯維爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: et
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps also an altered form of German   Ehm  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dun in Angus.

variants.name: Dunn
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinn, Ó Doinn ‘descendant of Donn’, a byname meaning ‘brown-haired’ or ‘chieftain’. Compare Dunne . This name has sometimes been Anglicized as Brown .
English: nickname for a dark complexioned or swarthy man, from Middle English dun ‘dun, dark’ (Old English dunn ‘dull brown’).
Scottish: habitational name from Dun in Angus, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’. Compare Dun .

nameMeanings.name: Geoffroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I was born in 1162, his father, Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis, was 21 and his mother, Ida de Chiny, was 20. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Elisabeth de Dampierre. He died on 20 June 1222, at the age of 60, and was buried in Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I est né en 1162, son père, Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ida de Chiny, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Elisabeth de Dampierre. Il est décédé le 20 juin 1222, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I 1162 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis 21 und seine Mutter Ida de Chiny 20. Er hatte mit Elisabeth de Dampierre mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. Juni 1222 im Alter von 60 Jahren und wurde in Verdun, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I è nato il nel 1162, il suo padre, Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Ida de Chiny, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Elisabeth de Dampierre. Morì il 20 giugno 1222, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun Iが1162年に生まれた時，父Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louisは21歳，母Ida de Chinyは20歳であった。彼はElisabeth de Dampierreとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1222年6月20日に60歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウゼバーダンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I(이)가 1162년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Ida de Chiny(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Elisabeth de Dampierre(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1222년 6월 20일 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우스 베르던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I nasceu em 1162, seu pai, Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ida de Chiny, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Elisabeth de Dampierre. Ele faleceu em 20 de junho de 1222, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I родился в 1162 г., его отцу по имени Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ida de Chiny, 20. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Elisabeth de Dampierre. Он умер 20 июня 1222 г. в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности вирдун, меус, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I nació en 1162, su papá, Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Ida de Chiny, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Elisabeth de Dampierre. Murió el 20 de junio de 1222, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.
